svg.text: Where ARP lives in the send() path

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the application see when ARP is happening?')
sendPrompt('What does the TCP layer add before passing to IP?')
g.text: adds src/dst port, seq no, segments data

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the IP layer decide the next hop?')
g.text: finds next-hop IP via routing table

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What exactly does the kernel check in the ARP cache?')
g.text: if miss: send ARP request, queue packet, wait

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Ethernet frame look like after MAC is resolved?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the ARP request and reply exchange')
